title: HeadySystems — The Sovereign AI Operating System
description: HeadySystems Inc. builds Heady™, the world's first sovereign AI operating system. φ-scaled architecture, 51 provisional patents, 17-Swarm Matrix of 89 specialized bee types, 20+ enterprise-grade AI agents, and Continuous Semantic Logic for geometric AI reasoning. Built on Google Cloud Run and Cloudflare Workers with zero-trust security, sub-50ms edge latency, and compliance readiness for SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR.
ogTitle: HeadySystems — The Sovereign AI Operating System
ogDescription: 51 patents. 20+ agents. 89 bee types. φ-scaled Sacred Geometry architecture. Heady™ is the enterprise AI operating system built for the next era of intelligent infrastructure. Founded by Eric Haywood.
